content:
Day 23: The Role of Proofreading & Final Edits
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Find a past writing assignment and proofread it for clarity, grammar, and conciseness. What changes did you make?

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

Why do errors become harder to see in our own writing? How does time and distance help with editing?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Think about a time you received feedback on your writing. How did you decide which suggestions to incorporate? What makes some feedback more valuable than others?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If you could write a perfect, error-free piece, what topic would you choose and why?


Day 24: Final Reflection & Takeaways
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Looking back on your work this semester, what is one piece of writing you are most proud of? What makes it stand out?
